text:
[SPEAKING PART 2]
02
Listen to a candidate talking about a famous person. The task is shown here.
Then answer questions 1-5 below.

64
Describe a famous person who you like or admire.
•	You should say:
•	who they are
•	why they are famous
where and when you saw them
and explain why you like this person.
1 Who was the famous person?
2 What does the famous person do?
3 Where did the candidate see this person?
4 When did the candidate see this person?
5 Why does the candidate like this person? (Give three reasons.)
Reason 1:
Reason 2:
Reason 3:

Track 64
Well, for this task I'd like to talk about Bill Gates. He's the
brilliant
explanation: صفتی قوی برای توصیف هوش و ذکاوت افراد که در تسک‌های توصیفی آیلتس نمره بالایی دارد.

text: computer programmer who created Microsoft and the Windows
operating system
explanation: یک اصطلاح فنی و رایج در حوزه تکنولوژی (IT).

text: . I first saw Bill Gates on television in 2001. He was talking about Windows XP, which
came out
explanation: عبارت فعلی (Phrasal Verb) برای عرضه محصولات جدید، کتاب یا فیلم.

text: that year. I remember thinking that he is the richest man in the world, but if you look at him, you'd never know that. He just looks like a
typical
explanation: صفتی برای توصیف ویژگی‌های معمول و همیشگی یک گروه یا دسته.

text:
computer programmer.
I like Bill Gates because he's
responsible for
explanation: ساختاری پرکاربرد برای بیان اینکه کسی عامل ایجاد یک تغییر یا انجام کاری بوده است.

text: bringing computers to millions of family homes around the world with his Windows operating system. This made computers easier to use for everyone and also at a price that many families could
afford
explanation: فعلی کلیدی در موضوعات اقتصادی و خرید؛ به معنای داشتن توان مالی کافی برای خرید چیزی.

text:
.
I also like him because he was the world's youngest
self-made
explanation: صفتی تحسین‌برانگیز برای افرادی که بدون ارث و با تلاش خود ثروتمند یا موفق شده‌اند.

text: billionaire at the time. If he could do it, I like to I think I could do it too. Finally, I admire him because he's very
generous
explanation: از ویژگی‌های مثبت شخصیتی (Personality Traits) که در آیلتس بسیار پرکاربرد است.

text: and uses his money to help people. He has
given away
translation: بخشیده است / (به رایگان) اهدا کرده است
explanation: عبارت فعلی (Phrasal Verb) به معنای بخشیدن چیزی به دیگران بدون دریافت پول.

text: a huge amount of his money to
charity
explanation: سازمان‌ها یا فعالیت‌هایی که برای کمک به نیازمندان پول جمع‌آوری می‌کنند.

text: , and I believe he plans to give most of it away in the end. I think this is an excellent idea and I hope this can show other rich and powerful people that they should also help others.
